channel.title: StateOfNature on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in StateOfNature on Nature Works

item.title: State of Nature report 2019
item.description:
Links to the State of Nature report 2019 from the British Trust for Ornithology @_BTO. Because the mainstream media really doesn’t seem that interested.

I gave a talk about The Smaller Forest Garden the other day, and only 3 people out of the two dozen strong audience had heard of the State of Nature report 2019 published October 2019. http://localhost:1313/blog/state-nature-report-2019/
